summary_en: ¥500M maximum, 400,000 shares (1.67% of issued shares outstanding), open-market acquisition, May 18 – Oct 31, 2026.
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Concerning Treasury Stock Acquisition
translation_en_brief: On May 15, 2026, SAN HOLDINGS' board of directors authorized a treasury stock acquisition program under Article 156 of the Companies Act (as applied via Article 165(3)). The company will acquire up to 400,000 shares (1.67% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum outlay of ¥500 million via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between May 18 and October 31, 2026. The stated purpose is to enhance shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency while enabling flexible capital allocation in response to changing business conditions. As of April 30, 2026, the company held 197,652 treasury shares (excluding 150,640 shares held by an employee stock ownership ESOP trust).
